name: Criminally Drawn
description:
Criminally Drawn tells real true-crime stories in cold documentary style — minimal 2D animation with occasional archival photos, narrated by Jonty.

Each video covers one full incident or one serial killer's life (~25 minutes). Sourced from public reporting. No gore graphics.

Playlists: Incidents · Serial Killers

Subscribe for the next case.
https://www.youtube.com/@criminallydrawn
audience: adult true-crime viewers who want factual, complete case storytelling in animated documentary form
geography: Worldwide cases allowed; prefer famous US cases while the channel is new
